title: Day_Nurseries_(Repeal) Act, 2011

sections.title: (1) The Day Nurseries Act, 1957, is hereby repealed. Repeal of
sections.body:
(1) The Day Nurseries Act, 1957, is hereby repealed. Repeal of
Cap 313
Notwithstanding subsection (1), a certificate of registration
issued under the repealed Act shall be valid for a period of six Act No. 63
months after which the holder thereof shall apply for registration of 1957
in accordance with the provisions of the Education Act, 2011. Act No. 23
of 2011
Notwithstanding subsection (1), any existing rights
conferred on a person under the repealed Act shall continue to be Cap 313
held by the person as if conferred under the Education Act, 2011, Act No. 23
of 211
and for the purposes of the Education Act, 2011.
Act No. 23
of 2011

sections.title: (1) Any legal proceedings pending immediately before the Legal
sections.body:
(1) Any legal proceedings pending immediately before the Legal
publication of this Act by or against a local authority may be proceedings
continued by or against the Government.
(2) After the publication of this Act, proceedings in respect of
any right, liability or obligation which was vested in, held, enjoyed,
incurred or suffered by a local authority, may be instituted by or
against the Government.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K1,000 each.
86
1
